message:
feat(fcp-streaming): add StreamHealthTracker state machine for connection liveness

Introduce StreamHealthState (Connected, Degraded, Reconnecting, Unhealthy)
with a full state-machine model for long-lived streaming connections.
StreamHealthTracker monitors heartbeat liveness, reconnection history,
and maps to fcp_core::ConnectorHealth. Add StreamHealthConfig for
configurable thresholds and StreamHealthSnapshot for timestamped state
export. Add chrono dependency for health snapshot timestamps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
